name: customer-prepedu
description: Optional customer-specific PrepEdu product context overlay. Provides company strategy, markets, squads, north stars, and active problems via teamContext for product skills when explicitly selected. Activate by adding "customer-prepedu" to selectedPacks in .prepkit/pack-selection.json, then rebuild with: node .prepkit/scripts/build-pack.mjs --packs <existing-packs>,customer-prepedu
